claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Preserve Spanish, Portuguese, and English source-language fields where available.
Track reporting period separately from retrieval date.
Do not treat regional economic indicators as investment advice or real-time market signals.
name: ECLAC
purpose: Dry-run Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean macroeconomic and regional development metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Preserve agency-provided magnitude, depth, and location fields.
Treat early seismic notices as revisable.
Cross-reference significant events with USGS or EMSC.
name: SSN Mexico
purpose: Dry-run Mexican National Seismological Service earthquake metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Preserve Portuguese source-language provenance.
Distinguish satellite observation metadata from environmental interpretation.
Cross-reference politically sensitive environmental claims with independent sources where possible.
name: INPE Brazil
purpose: Dry-run Brazil INPE Earth-observation, deforestation, fire, and environmental metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Preserve official alert level and volcano terminology.
Do not infer aviation, evacuation, or local impact beyond source statements.
Cross-reference major eruptions with Smithsonian Global Volcanism Program where possible.
name: SERNAGEOMIN Chile
purpose: Dry-run Chilean geological and volcano-monitoring metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Handle missing fields gracefully during severe storm reporting.
Separate local utility or infrastructure reports from regional impact claims.
Preserve source-country and island-level provenance.
name: CDEMA
purpose: Dry-run Caribbean Disaster Emergency Management Agency incident and disaster-response metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Preserve Spanish source-language fields and translated fields separately.
Separate environmental observation from policy interpretation.
Track country and regional scope explicitly.
name: SICA
purpose: Dry-run Central American Integration System climate and environmental-risk metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Verify current Reuters feed URLs before relying on them.
Preserve source URL and retrieval timestamp.
Require independent corroboration before promoting breaking news to validated status.
name: Reuters verification
purpose: Dry-run Reuters feed verification and global-news source metadata capture.
